package.name: hil_udp_relay
package.description: Lightweight typed UDP relay (ROS 2 side) connecting the Humble laptop (MuJoCo sim world) to the Noetic Orin NX (autonomy). Replaces ros1_bridge, which is broken on this Jetson (Foxy EOL bad_alloc per message). hil_relay_tx_node ships the sensor DOWN-link (/livox/lidar CustomMsg + /livox/imu) to the NX; hil_relay_rx_node receives the UP-link (/robot/cmd_vel and optional viz) back.
